product: Mount Delta shares to an existing shared catalog
tagline: Delta Sharing recipients can now mount shares received from their Delta Sharing provider to an existing shared catalog.
what_it_does: Delta Sharing recipients can now mount shares received from their Delta Sharing provider to an existing shared catalog. Previously, recipients needed to create a new catalog for each new share. This page describes how to read data shared with you using the Databricks to Databricks OpenSharing protocol, where Databricks manages a secure connection for data sharing.
why_it_matters: note If you are creating a catalog from an SAP BDC share, SAP semantic metadata (table and column comments, primary keys, foreign keys, and governance tags) syncs automatically into the catalog.
plain_summary: Delta Sharing recipients can now mount shares received from their Delta Sharing provider to an existing shared catalog. Previously, recipients needed to create a new catalog for each new share.
key_takeaway: Delta Sharing recipients can now mount shares received from their Delta Sharing provider to an existing shared catalog.
